fields.title: Remove old task module after agent migration
fields.description:
Remove the old task/ module after agent system is complete.

## Files to Remove
- src/task/index.ts
- src/task/runner.ts
- src/task/render.ts
- src/task/sessions.ts
- src/task/types.ts (if not reused)
- src/task/approval-broker.ts (if not reused)
- src/task/worker-sandbox.ts (if not reused)
- src/task/sandbox-policy.ts (moved to agent/)
- src/services/task.ts

## Files to Keep/Migrate
- src/task/registry.ts → src/agent/registry.ts
- src/task/skills.ts → src/agent/skills.ts

## Updates Required
- Remove task tool registration from app.ts
- Update any imports referencing task/
- Remove task-related types from services

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] All task/ files removed or migrated
- [ ] No dangling imports to task/
- [ ] app.ts updated to use agent module
- [ ] Build passes with no task references
- [ ] Old 'task' tool no longer registered
fields.close_reason: Implemented and migrated non-blocking agent system
